name: PricingPlan
description: A single pricing plan or subscription tier offered by an API or SaaS provider, as represented in an API Commons Plans artifact.

id.description: Stable slug identifying this plan within the provider's catalog.

name.description: Display name of the plan or tier.

type.description: Plan model: how access and billing are structured.

description.description: Human-readable description of the plan, its audience, and what it includes.
description.example: Standard pricing for online card payments.

provider.description: Name of the provider publishing this plan.

provider_id.description: Slug of the provider in the API Evangelist network.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for prices in this plan.

billing_period.description: Recurring billing cadence for the plan.

base_price.description: Base recurring price for the plan, expressed as a string to accommodate ranges, formulas, and 'Contact Us' values.

entries.description: Metered or included entries that make up the plan (quotas, transactions, seats, features).

sources.description: URLs from which this plan was sourced — typically a pricing page or provider documentation.

reconciled.description: Whether this plan has been reconciled against provider-published documentation rather than scaffolded.
